title: The Big Cheese Mole Scatter Granules - 450g, Natural/ Biodegradable Eﬀective Mole Deterrent Harmless to Animals and the eEnvironment Treat Gardens up to 45 sq m. Ready-To-Use
features: ☑ NATURAL INGREDIENTS: 100% biodegradable and water-soluble plant oils on clay substrate deter moles without harm either to wildlife or the environment
☑ PLANT-SAFE: Mole Scatter Granules are safe to use on lawns and planted areas and there is no need to exclude children or pets from treated areas
☑ READY-TO-USE: Re-usable shaker-cap dispenser for easy application - Treats 45m2
☑ WORKS SEASONALLY: Water-activated ingredients work well in Autumn, Winter, and Spring, or whenever moles are active and causing damage around the garden
☑ REFILLS AVAILABLE: Reﬁll shaker-cap dispenser using 750g Mole Scatter Granules supplied in biodegradable paper packaging
description: From the manufacturer Natural treatment that does not harm wildlife Caring control of pets and wildlife Protect lawns and gardens from damage caused by moles. Lawns Seed beds Meadows Vegetable patches Allotments Mole Scatter Granules from Defenders - 450g Treats mole hills and tunnels and deters moles without harm Mole Scatter Granules from Defenders combine natural plant oil extracts with biodegradable granules for the treatment of mole tunnels in vulnerable areas such as seed beds, lawns, meadows and parks. The plant oils penetrate down into the tunnels and surrounding earth, tainting the moles' food source and eliciting an oral repulsive response, encouraging them to find new feeding locations. Works as an aversive product. Treats mole hills and tunnels without harm. Biodegradable granules coated with castor oil soak through the soil and taint the taste of the food source (earthworms), discouraging the mole from staying within the treated area. Natural treatment that does not harm wildlife. Integrated easy-use shaker cap. Safe for use around children and pets. Year-round use, unaffected in wet conditions. Also available in a 2.5kg bottle. Child and pet safe Safe to use around children and pets. Biodegradable Mole Scatter Granules are a natural biodegradable, inert clay carrier coated in castor oil that does not harm wildlife. Effective in all weather conditions Effective in all weather conditions, mole scatter granules can be used year round. How do the Mole Scatter Granules work? Scatter the granules in the area affected by mole activity. The natural plant oils in the product penetrate down into the mole tunnels and surrounding earth. The oils taint the moles' food source, encouraging them to move to new feeding locations, away from the protected area. Once an area is treated, mole disturbances may increase as they actively seek a new source of food. How to use Mole Scatter Granules Identify the area(s) where mole activity is evident. Scatter the granules on top of the affected area at the rate of 1kg per 100 sq m. These can be distributed either by hand or using a garden spreader. A shaker cap is fitted to the bottle for easy use. Once application of the product is complete, it's recommended that the treated area is watered lightly to speed up the release of the material and penetration into the soil. Repeat the treatment as and when new diggings or mole hills are evident. Products to compliment Mole Scatter Granules To use alongside the Mole Scatter Granules, there are other products to help catch and repel moles from vulnerable areas. STV645 Mega-Sonic Mole Repeller - a vibrating stake that emits a sonic pulse. STV640 Advanced Solar Mole Repeller - an upgraded stake that vibrates and emits a solar pulse. Contains a solar panel to recharge the batteries. STV312 Mole Claw Trap - traditional catch and kill mole trap.
